input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8256 [Automation] java run fails for org.apache.parquet:parquet-jackson:1.16.0; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Do not add unshaded Jackson dependencies for normal coverage; tests should exercise shaded.parquet.com.fasterxml.jackson classes from parquet-jackson itself.
The reported failure appears to be a version/API behavior mismatch in an existing assertion, not missing setup.
Existing tests include JVM/native-image --add-opens for java.base/java.util to support deep Jackson utility coverage; avoid removing that existing build setup if those tests remain.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra dependency, Docker image, environment variable, or system property is needed: parquet-jackson 1.16.0 is a shaded Jackson packaging artifact with no external runtime dependency beyond JDK modules, and meaningful coverage is reachable through the relocated Jackson APIs already in the artifact.
